Event: Royal Challenge - Season 14
Event Date: 01/06/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: A121
Flaming Shield

Triggers: Once in a while

A random ally with the least current health gains a fire shield. The shield blocks 5 attacks.
Whenever the shield blocks an attack, all enemies around the unit take 100000 magic damage and catch fire. The burning units take 200000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
